name: Fibria Celulose S.A.
description: Fibria Celulose S.A. was a Brazilian forest products company and the world's leading producer of eucalyptus pulp from planted forests. The company engaged in the cultivation of eucalyptus forests, the production and sale of bleached eucalyptus kraft pulp, and the generation of energy from biomass. Headquartered in São Paulo, Brazil, Fibria operated several pulp mills and managed extensive forest holdings before its merger with Suzano Papel e Celulose in January 2019, which created the world's largest market pulp producer.
